ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student. */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student. */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student. */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender of the student (1 - male, 0 - female). */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student. */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student (e.g., postal code). */,
  "famsize" INTEGER /* Size of the family (1 - small, 0 - large). */,
  "Pstatus" INTEGER /* Parental status (1 - living together, 0 - apart). */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student. */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student. */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student. */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the student. */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student. */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary parent or guardian. */,
  "parent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary parent or guardian. */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact. */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student (foreign key from students table). */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education level (0-4 scale). */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education level (0-4 scale). */,
  "G1" INTEGER /* First period grade. */,
  "G2" INTEGER /* Second period grade. */,
  "G3" INTEGER /* Final grade. */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures. */,
  "absent_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the student was absent. */,
  "late_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the student was late. */,
  "extra_curricular_grades" TEXT /* Grades or performance in extracurricular activities. */,
  "teacher_comments" TEXT /* Comments from teachers on the student's performance. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic performance record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic performance record was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student (foreign key from students table). */,
  "schoolsup" INTEGER /* School support received (1 - yes, 0 - no). */,
  "famsup" INTEGER /* Family support received (1 - yes, 0 - no). */,
  "paid" INTEGER /* Extra classes taken (1 - yes, 0 - no). */,
  "activities" INTEGER /* Participation in extracurricular activities (1 - yes, 0 - no). */,
  "counseling_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of counseling sessions attended. */,
  "tutoring_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of tutoring sessions attended. */,
  "support_comments" TEXT /* Comments from support staff on the student's progress. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the support record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the support record was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_life" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student (foreign key from students table). */,
  "traveltime" INTEGER /* Travel time to school (1-4 scale). */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Study time (1-4 scale). */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time after school (1-4 scale). */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends frequency (1-4 scale). */,
  "social_media_usage" INTEGER /* Frequency of social media usage. */,
  "community_involvement" INTEGER /* Level of involvement in community activities. */,
  "social_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the student's social life. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the social life record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the social life record was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student (foreign key from students table). */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health status (1-5 scale). */,
  "Dalc" INTEGER /* Weekend alcohol consumption (1-5 scale). */,
  "Walc" INTEGER /* Weekday alcohol consumption (1-5 scale). */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of school absences. */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the student has. */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication the student is taking. */,
  "mental_health" TEXT /* Mental health status (e.g., anxiety, depression). */,
  "health_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the student's health. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health status record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health status record was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_relationships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student (foreign key from students table). */,
  "famrel" INTEGER /* Family relationships quality (1-5 scale). */,
  "internet" INTEGER /* Internet access (1 - yes, 0 - no). */,
  "romantic" INTEGER /* Romantic relationship status (1 - yes, 0 - no). */,
  "sibling_relations" INTEGER /* Quality of relationships with siblings. */,
  "peer_relations" INTEGER /* Quality of relationships with peers. */,
  "relationship_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the student's relationships. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
